title: Click me button automation
excerpt: I want to create an automation using the “click me button” that says if the button is NOT click, each week Friday we get notified.  There is no NOT click option. it only has the “when button clicked”.  Is there any other…

posts.author: Bella (Bella)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to create an automation using the “click me button” that says if the button is NOT click, each week Friday we get notified. There is no NOT click option. it only has the “when button clicked”. Is there any other way for me to get notified when the button is not clicked? Thanks!

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml: Suggestion: In the button click actions use it to set a date field to today and then push by 7. Then have any automation based on that date field to notify when it goes past. if you then push the button every friday it resets the “alert” mechanism, if you miss a button press the alert automation will send.

posts.author: Bella (Bella)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi MHaigh, Thank you! will try this out.
